task: Comprehensive UX/UI and spacing fix for ClawTask dashboard

css_classes_updated: ctrl-panel: padding now uses --panel-padding (24px), gap uses --gap-md
ctrl-section-title: added border-bottom for visual separation, letter-spacing improved
prompt-sidebar: added border and background for visibility
prompt-save-btn: padding increased to 7px 16px, added border-radius
tools-table-wrap: added border for proper containment
tools-table th: added background for header distinction
llm-providers-grid: minmax increased to 180px, gap uses --gap-md
llm-routes-table: added border, th gets background
ap-tags: gap uses --gap-xs, added align-items center
dept-tab: padding increased (7px 14px), added border-radius, white-space nowrap
sub-mq-badge: added background/border/padding for badge style
sk-table th: added background for header distinction
sk-pill: padding uses --badge-padding, added border-radius, white-space nowrap
wi-kpi-row: removed extra padding, uses --gap-md, margin-bottom --gap-md
wi-kpi-card: padding uses --card-padding, gap uses --gap-sm, added border-radius
wi-result-box: removed margin, added margin-bottom --gap-md, added border-radius
wi-activity-row: padding increased (10px 14px), gap uses --gap-sm, added border-radius
wi-config-item: padding increased (10px 14px), added border-radius, gap uses --gap-sm
seo-cap-card: padding uses --card-padding, gap uses --gap-sm, added border-radius
wa-grid: removed padding (now in ctrl-panel), gap uses --gap-md
wa-card: padding uses --card-padding, gap uses --gap-sm, added border-radius
dark_mode_additions: sk-table-wrap, tools-table-wrap, llm-routes-table: dark border colors
Table th backgrounds: dark variant for all tables
new_css_classes_added: telem-card, telem-card-header, telem-card-agent, telem-card-ts, telem-card-action, telem-card-status-ok/err
html_panels_fixed: Telemetry KPI row: replaced inline styles with telem-kpi-row/cell classes
Knowledge Browser: increased width to 240px, fixed header padding, improved content padding
Blackboard panel: ctrl-header padding, gap uses variables, write panel width 300px
ACP Console: header padding, feed padding, dispatch panel width 280px, form heights 36px
Terminal: header padding, log padding, input row alignment, run button padding
Fast Retrieval: padding uses --panel-padding, gap uses --gap-md, border-radius on inputs
Media Studio: header padding, inner padding uses --panel-padding, gap uses --gap-lg
Channels: padding uses --panel-padding, channelLog has border/background
Nova/AI Hub headers: padding uses card-padding/panel-padding
Telemetry header: consistent padding, increased border contrast
CI/CD: header padding, inner content gap/padding uses variables, cicdRuns has border
ChangeWatch alert bar: left offset matches sidebar width (210px), padding increased

design_principles_applied.spacing_consistency: All gaps, padding, margins now use CSS variable tokens
design_principles_applied.table_consistency: All tables: th/td padding 10px 14px, header background, border wrapper
design_principles_applied.dark_mode: Comprehensive dark mode overrides for all new components
design_principles_applied.vertical_rhythm: Consistent gap/margin-bottom using spacing scale variables

notes: All JavaScript logic is untouched — only CSS and HTML structure modified
CSS variables are backward-compatible: no old usage broken
Inline styles on panels replaced with CSS variable references
Dark mode class uses body.dark (consistent with existing pattern)
